title: autobench.diversity v1
description: SACS diversity tracker snapshot per RSI iteration. Fingerprint is a 23-dim structural vector of the iteration's ImprovementDelta (which fields changed, in which direction). Penalty is the MAP term subtracted from adjusted_utility for convergence checks. Source: /autobench. See autobench/research/diversity_penalty_2026.md and autobench/diversity.py.

iteration.description: RSI iteration number this snapshot belongs to

fingerprint.description: 23-dim structural fingerprint of the iteration's ImprovementDelta

penalty.description: SACS MAP penalty applied to adjusted_utility for this iteration

diversity_score.description: 1.0 = fully diverse, 0.0 = fully redundant. Computed as 1 - mean pairwise SACS over the memory bank

memory_size.description: Number of deltas currently in the rolling memory bank
